title: Has Nike lost its 'cool' factor? LeBron James weighs in
summary_full: Nike's stock has slumped as the sportswear giant faces new competitors and waning influence. LeBron James has some advice on how to regain its 'cool' factor.
summary_public: Nike's stock has slumped as the sportswear giant faces new competitors and waning influence. LeBron James has some advice on how to regain its 'cool' factor.
